name: Orchid Island Capital, Inc.
summary: PART I Our Company Orchid Island Capital, Inc., a Maryland corporation (Orchid, the Company, we or us), is a specialty finance company that invests in residential mortgage-backed securities (RMBS). The principal and interest payments of these RMBS are guaranteed by the Enterprises or the Government National Mortgage Association (Ginnie Mae and, collectively with the Enterprises, GSEs) and are backed primarily by single-family residential mortgage loans. We refer to these types of RMBS as Agency ...
